retrieved_result: Using WPS PIN Mode to Connect to a Network If you have a WPS-enabled wireless router or access point that supports PIN mode, you can use Wi-Fi Protected Setup (WPS) PIN mode to connect your scanner to the network. Set the connection mode switch on the scanner to AP mode. Open the input tray. Press and hold the Connect button and press the po
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses WPS PIN mode for connecting a scanner to a network, not about optimizing database queries.
